name: Creamy Cherry Frosting:
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Butter or Regular Margarine, Softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sifted confectioners sugar, butter, cherry juice, food coloring, and vanilla extract in a bowl.
2. Beat with an electric mixer at medium speed until smooth and creamy.
3. Add 1 more tablespoon of cherry juice, if necessary, to achieve a spreading consistency.
